title: Lucy en el infierno
overview: Horacio, an extremely misogynistic and sexist businessman, arranges a blind date with Olga, a pregnant woman. Horacio suggests they spend a day outdoors, away from the city, and Olga accepts. However, once there, Horacio is knocked out and kidnapped by Olga, who confesses her true intentions: to subject him to a unique experiment to bring about a complete change in him.
